calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2024 Off Calendar

Plaintiff?S Case Summary And Other Matter Supporting Request For Default Judgment By The Court
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25 am and concluding at 9:40 am.

Plaintiff 870 Market Street Associates II L.P. appearing represented by Adrian Sacharski, Esq.
Defendant Preston Marks LLC not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

SHELA MARKO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff 870 Market Street Associates II L.P. and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff 870 Market Street Associates II L.P., and against Defendants Preston Marks an individual and Preston Marks LLC, as follows:

1. Damages: $63,378.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $7,056.00
3. Costs: $640.00
4. Attorney fees: $19,140.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $90,214.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
